OMEGA CORPORATION

FORM 8-K CURRENT REPORT

Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition

Omega Corporation reported first quarter 2026 revenue of $3,250,000,000 and net income of $455,000,000.

Operating income was $610,000,000 and earnings per diluted share were $1.32 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026.

Looking ahead, management expects revenue between $3.40 billion and $3.55 billion in the second quarter.

The company expects diluted EPS in the range of $1.40 to $1.52 for the next quarter.

The board authorized a new share repurchase program of up to $500,000,000.

Omega also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share.
